dflash_arm.flash_attention: always-on (no CLI toggle in dflash_server; fa-window=0 means full FA)
dflash_arm.server_log_prefix_len_note: dflash_server's own stdout log line (not the JSON API response) prints prefix_len=N per completed request. Evidence captured from the clean-tree rebuild run.
dflash_arm.lucebox_checkout_dirty_note: lucebox_checkout_dirty=True here reflects ONLY the untracked build-cuda-sm86/ build output directory (see lucebox_dirty_files), NOT modified tracked source files. All 5 previously-modified source files were git-stashed before this build; HEAD=5e302cbb483819cd21e72f5dd8becaa609eca8cf with zero tracked-file diff, confirmed via git diff before the build ran.

clean_rerun_provenance.note: Original run's dflash arm used a dirty lucebox checkout with an uncommitted qwen35-prefill-skip-intermediate-output.patch-equivalent diff applied (verified byte-identical to the saved patch file). That diff was git-stashed and the checkout rebuilt clean at pinned rev 5e302cbb483819cd21e72f5dd8becaa609eca8cf before this re-run. Old dirty-tree dflash arrays preserved under 'dflash_dirty_tree' for comparison.
